title: Luscious Tangy Malaysian Gobo Burdock Curry
description: A tangy and gooey Malaysian curry featuring gobo burdock, perfect for a monsoon evening, this dish is egg free and friendly for all to enjoy.
instructions: Heat the oil in a large pan over medium heat and saute the onion until softened.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the sliced gobo burdock and cook for 5 minutes until it starts to soften.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the tamarind paste and cook for 1 minute until well combined.
Add the coconut milk and water, and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let the curry simmer for 20 minutes until the gobo burdock is tender.
Season the curry with salt to taste.
Flambe the curry with a small amount of oil to give it a smoky flavor.
Serve the curry hot over rice or with roti.
